title: Status, Events, Logs, Metrics, Traces, Audit, and Layered Incident Response · Spiral Platform Review
summary: An on-call handoff reconstructs status, events, logs, metrics, traces, audit, and layered incident response from delayed object status, challenges one retained misconception, and revises the cluster and workload incident evidence record under changed capacity. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for cluster and workload incident evidence record after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defe…
objectives: Correlate spec, observedGeneration, conditions, reasons, messages, events, resource versions, controller ownership, and event retention without treating event order as durable history.
Collect current and previous container logs, multi-container streams, timestamps, kubelet and runtime logs, rotation, retention, and node-loss boundaries.
Distinguish resource metrics, component metrics, application metrics, state metrics, cardinality, scrape, storage, alert, and autoscaling evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# kubernetes-basics cumulative orchestration portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never invoke kubectl, read kubeconfig, contact a cluster API, or execute host commands.
workspace: kubernetes
version-baseline:
  kubernetes: 1.36.2
  minikube: 1.38.1
  gateway-api: 1.5.1
  helm: 4.2.2
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-cluster
evidence:

steps.title: K8s Status Conditions Events · changed case · Review K8s Status Conditions Events
steps.instruction:
review case — A review workload restarts after revision 2; logs rotated, metrics aggregate away one replica, events are delayed, and an operator deletes the Pod first. Preserve object status, events, current and previous logs, metrics, traces, node evidence, and a causal timeline. Competency probe: Correlate spec, observedGeneration, conditions, reasons, messages, events, resource versions, controller ownership, and event retention without treating event order as durable history.

Which action demonstrates K8s Status Conditions Events without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: K8s Status Conditions Events · changed case · Review K8s Status Conditions Events.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for correlate spec, observedgeneration, conditions, reasons, messages, events, resource versions, controller ownership, and event retention without treating event order as durable history. For K8s Status Conditions Events · changed case · Review K8s Status Conditions Events, keep K8s Status Conditions Events connected to mechanically reviewable Kubernetes object, status, and transfer evidence.
